name: Tower Defender
description: You’ve always dreamed to become a super-heroe ? You’ve always wanted to fly in the sky, save people and stuff? Well, in this case you’re at the wrong house but if you feel like a super-villain, you rang the right bell. Crime geniuses of all kind, be welcomed in this great and beautiful operation that is TD Super Heroes. We have bank to rob, building to blow up and all we ask of you… is to defend us in front of an army of super-heroes that are slightly pissed and potentially lethally aggressive… Easy, right?
instructions: You ve always dreamed to become a super-heroe You ve always wanted to fly in the sky save people and stuff Well in this case you re at the wrong house but if you feel like a super-villain you rang the right bell Crime geniuses of all kind be welco
